run_metadata.goal: investor pitch deck for Jetty (jetty.io), the agentic evaluation platform for AI/ML workflows

stages.name: spec_completeness
stages.message: All 16 slides have kind, headline, speaker notes, and source references

stages.name: through_line
stages.message: Through-line present in cover slide (slide 1) and called back in closing slide (slide 16)

stages.name: source_grounding
stages.message: All factual claims traced to jetty.io, jettyio-skills README, QUICKSTART, and pricing page

stages.name: density
stages.message: All slides within speaker-led budget (1-3 bullets); no overflow splits required

stages.name: no_internal_leakage
stages.message: No runbook/spec internals (kind names, layout values, preset slugs, file paths) in slide text

stages.name: no_llm_tells
stages.message: No hollow intensifiers, generic transitions, filler openers, or unsupported superlatives found

stages.name: compilation
stages.message: slidev build exited 0; two upstream @vueuse/core annotation warnings did not affect output

stages.name: pdf_export
stages.message: deck.pdf produced successfully (176494 bytes) via slidev export

stages.name: results_hygiene
stages.message: No node_modules/, dist/, or package*.json in /app/results; all build work confined to /app/work

stages.name: output_files
stages.message: All required deliverables present and non-empty: deck.spec.md, slides.md, deck.pdf, README.md, styles/tokens.css, summary.md, validation_report.json
